entries.status: Preflight: gh authed (darndestdabbler); HEAD Test run green; VSIX 0.45.0 packages (43 files); versions consistent (ext 0.45.0/router 0.33.0). entries.description: Preflight: gh authed; HEAD Test green; VSIX 0.45.0 packages; versions consistent (ext 0.45.0/router 0.33.0). Discovered TRUE published state via CI/PyPI ground truth: ext 0.42.0 (published 2026-07-13) + router 0.32.0 (published 2026-07-10); the changelogs' 0.40.0/0.30.0 text was stale. Both publish pipelines proven working.

Corrected changelog truth: finalized ext 0.45.0 + router 0.33.0 headers (dated 2026-07-14, published, superseding live 0.42.0/0.32.0); corrected interim headers (0.42.0=published 2026-07-13, 0.43.0/0.44.0=folded into 0.45.0, router 0.31.0=folded into 0.32.0, 0.32.0=published 2026-07-10); neutralized stale present-tense registry-live claims. repository-reference.md release-status to be updated at close with real run IDs.
